title: The Strongest Warrior
overview: Members of the Warunimal Empire stand before Pan-Taron, who pilots the Panda-Z.

title: Table Manners
overview: Dr. Panji prepares a delicious meal but Pan-Taron cannot eat. Meals in this world are usually batteries, but Pan-Taron has trouble with utensils.

title: Certain Death! Rocket Punch!
overview: Today's opponent is the Super Mow Jumbo, controlled by Warunimal General Mougyu Pan-Taron unleashes his special Rocket Punch! attack!

title: A Quiet Duel
overview: Dr. Jangary, a mecha master, even after being defeated, rises up and advances to a new battle.

title: The Midnight Angel
overview: A beautiful moon lit the Robonimal World. The research institute was swaying for some reason.

title: Payphone
overview: Nature is so much different from the city. A picnic is planned. Out in nature, you cannot make any calls. If Denwan comes, though, calls can be made!

title: Briefing
overview: The Warunimal Empire continues to wish for conquering the world. However, Panda-Z always stands in it's way.

title: Rescue Mission: No Postponement for Rain (1)
overview: Ravinna was left alone outside in the heavy rain and thunder. A rescue is needed before she gets wet in the rain!

title: Wild Soldier
overview: Super Mow Jumbo DX stands tall! However, this fight feels the same as the scene before that had repeated several times.

title: A New Quiet Duel (1)
overview: Mougyu has lost the fight and is immersed in loneliness. His eternal rival, Pan-Taron, appears.

title: Rescue Mission: No Postponement for Rain (2)
overview: Ravinna was left behind in the rain. In order to not repeat the tragedy again, a new team will stand up: The Bear Rescue Team!

title: Hey, Bob...
overview: Mougyu swears to the sunset that his defeats will help him become stronger!

title: Another Quiet Duel (2)
overview: Dr. Jangary learns the iron rule of the fight!

title: Mystery Circle
overview: A red circle is written on the calendar so the date would not be forgotten. But, what is it for? Birthday? Dinner Party?

title: Friends
overview: The Warunimal Empire continues to organize to conquer the world using strict rules and unbelievable leadership.

title: Rescue Mission: No Postponement for Rain (3)
overview: Ravinna again was left out in heavy rain. This time any enemy appears! Panda-Z is being dispatched!

title: Poltergeist
overview: The breaker broke and is now surrounded by darkness. Pan-Taron, Ravinna, and Denwan begin to explore to find out the cause.

title: Fight of the Apocalypse
overview: An extreme battle takes place between Mow Jumbo and Panda-Z. The intensity climbs as the battle leaves the ground and heads to the sky!

title: Night Life
overview: Night... a time of love. A guy stops in front of the room of RubyRaby, the only female of the Four Generals of the Warunimal Empire.

title: Destroy Panda-Z
overview: Wolgar is sent to defeat Panda-Z! But Pan-Talon won't flinch and uses a different attack than before!

title: One's Fate
overview: The longer the fight, the more damage is done to Panda-Z. There is no time for rest for the repair team!

title: Battle X
overview: The fight continues,. but today is different! A female maiden has found love during the battle.

title: Nice Body
overview: The fight continues,. but today is different! A female maiden has found love during the battle.

title: The Gorgeous Ruby Rabby
overview: What happened to Ravinna and Dr. Panji?

title: Another Quiet Duel
overview: Panda-Z must fly to stop the violent enemy! Carefulness is key! The battle can be decided in any moment.

title: Getaway
overview: Several shocks run through the feet. Twisting and flying, anything to dodge the shock.

title: Nurse Rabinna
overview: Getting injured is a testament to fighting for what you love. Because it is an emergency, Ravinna will practice being the relief team!

title: Facing Tomorrow
overview: Pan-Taron is alone watching the sea. He saw his father's appearance in his dreams.

title: A Quiet Duel (3)
overview: Pan-Taron is alone watching the sea. He saw his father's appearance in his dreams.

title: Sortie! Black Ham Gear
overview: The time of the decisive battle has come!
